pattern: Because the array is a permutation, following index-to-value links partitions it into disjoint cycles, and the answer is simply the longest cycle length found by a single visited sweep.
hints: Each starting index eventually loops back on itself; the sequences are really the cycles of a permutation.
Once a cycle is fully walked, every element in it produces the same set length, so none of them ever needs to be revisited.
Mark elements as visited while walking each chain; for an unvisited start, follow nums[i] until you return to a seen value, counting the steps, and keep the maximum.

edge_inputs.description: identity permutation, every cycle length one
mix of cycles where the longest is not the first
two separate cycles of equal length
reverse permutation produces many small swaps and one fixed center

stress.description: random permutation of 0..size-1 to exercise mixed cycle structure
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    p = list(range(n))
    rng.shuffle(p)
    return [p]
